items.summary: Update the frontend search result handling in useQueries.ts and any search result rendering components to correctly parse and display results returned from the Google Custom Search API response format (items array with title, link, snippet fields), replacing any prior DuckDuckGo-specific result parsing.

Update the backend search endpoint in backend/main.mo to use the Google Custom Search JSON API with the provided Search Engine ID (a566dfe30b89f4713) instead of DuckDuckGo. The endpoint should construct requests to 'https://www.googleapis.com/customsearch/v1' with the query parameter 'q', the 'cx' parameter set to 'a566dfe30b89f4713', and return the parsed search results to the frontend.
